case_title: JOHN THOMAS MCCANN VS. CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING & SERVICES INC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCANN, JOHN THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY'S OFFICE MOVING & SERVICES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA WESTERN OFFICE INSTALLATIONS & SERVICE $8,587.85 PRINCIPAL, $40.75 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,808.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
